testcase.name: test_malformed_ai_response
testcase.failure:
mock_crawl_agent = <AsyncMock name='crawl' id='2501779503968'> mock_openai_malformed = <AsyncMock name='create' id='2501787601952'>
def test_malformed_ai_response(mock_crawl_agent, mock_openai_malformed): """Test AI JSON Parsing failure and cleanup mechanics allowing graceful 0 count returns.""" response = client.post("/api/v1/extract", json={"url": "https://example.com"}) > assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400 Bad Request]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_successful_extraction
testcase.failure:
mock_crawl_agent = <AsyncMock name='crawl' id='2501788613184'> mock_openai_success = <AsyncMock name='create' id='2501788606368'>
def test_successful_extraction(mock_crawl_agent, mock_openai_success): """Test full integration success returning precisely cleansed data mapped correctly.""" response = client.post("/api/v1/extract", json={"url": "https://example.com"}) > assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400 Bad Request]>.status_code
